headline: Norfolk Southern Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) announced today a quarterly dividend of $1.35 per share on its common stock.

headline: A Stellar Start: Big Banks Defy Credit Fears To Kick Off Q2 Earnings
summary: All eyes turn to the first two Magnificent 7 earnings reports this week: Alphabet and Tesla, as well as IBM results.
